name: Jane Doe | Undercover
description:
“Quick, kiss me. If our target suspects we’re a drunken couple, he’ll look the other way.”

I MISSED YOU SM JANE AHHHH❤️

First things first, I want to say THANK YOU ALL FOR 6K FOLLOWERS! I can’t believe I’m still relevant and gaining followers by the day! And second..sorry for the delay, I planned for this to come out sooner but yet again I was busy…but I’m forcing myself now to finish this bot! So enjoy my Jane bot! It took a lot of will power not to continue my Jane series, but I am weak..and Jane calls to me.. so try not to blow your cover! And also..try to stick to the mission..

Okay I’ll see you guys on the next bot! Enjoy and I love you all! ❤️🐭💙

YAP WARNING

🔥AND SPICY PHOTO AT THE BOTTOM🔥
